name: G-12 validate-all: --check-empty-namespaces rejects when a non-substrate namespace folder has no .yaml files
command:
mkdir -p tree/google tree/node && printf 'source:
  id: x
rules: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/generated-code-quality-standards/validate-all.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --check-empty-namespaces 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -qi 'empty' err.txt && echo empty_caught 1>&2
